analysis.name: ARC
analysis.summary: ARC代币在PumpSwap上24小时暴涨1110%，但流动性极低（仅1.7万美元），基本面与链上代币严重脱钩。同名项目Circle的Arc L1区块链与当前代币无关，新闻多为误导。高波动、低流动性、无实质催化，风险极高。

recommendation.invalidation: 无，当前数据不支持任何买入逻辑

catalysts: 可能与Circle的Arc L1区块链同名混淆

fundamentals: CoinGecko上ARC项目描述为AI基础设施，但当前链上代币与该项目无关
CoinGecko上ARC市值63.7万美元，FDV相同，供应量10.3亿
PumpSwap上ARC/SOL对流动性仅1.7万美元，市值45.2万美元
同名Circle的Arc L1区块链已融资2.22亿美元，但尚无代币
新闻中多数提及的ARC实为Circle项目，与本代币无关
marketRead: PumpSwap上24小时涨幅1110%，但成交量仅1370万美元，流动性极低
价格从极低水平拉升，可能存在拉高出货或流动性陷阱
无历史K线数据，无法判断趋势
CoinGecko上ARC价格24小时下跌1.33%，与PumpSwap数据严重背离
risks: 流动性极低（1.7万美元），大额卖出易导致滑点和价格崩溃
代币与知名项目Circle的Arc同名，存在混淆和冒名风险
新闻利好均指向Circle的Arc，与本代币无关，无实质催化
PumpSwap为去中心化交易所，合约风险高，无审计信息
价格暴涨后可能迅速归零
watchlist: 是否有官方渠道澄清代币身份
Circle Arc代币是否正式发行
sourceNotes: 数据来源为CoinGecko和DexScreener，PumpSwap数据可能不完整
新闻来源多为聚合器，部分内容可能不准确
代币身份存疑，需谨慎对待

profile.name: ARC
profile.description: ARC is the infrastructure layer for high-performance, privacy-first AI models, designed to make artificial intelligence faster, private, and more sustainable. Powered by its proprietary Efficiency AI technology, ARC empowers businesses and individuals through its core products, Reactor and Matrix. Especially through Matrix, ARC combines Efficiency AI with blockchain technology to make AI operations private, protecting sensitive data and putting user back in control. The $ARC utility token, live on Ethereum and expanding to Layer-2, provides the community with access to governance, staking and participation in ARC’s AI ecosystem. With ARC, anyone can take part in an AI ecosystem built around high performance, privacy, and sustainable solutions.
